positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric pattern featuring abstract mountain ranges and stylized nocturnal forest silhouettes. The design should use high contrast black and white ink on a neutral background, rendered with clean, thick lines and negative space emphasis. Include various fauna silhouettes like deer, owls, and foxes integrated subtly into the landscape. Composition must be centrally balanced and highly repeatable, optimized for full-coverage apparel printing. Style: Modern Nordic folk art meets Art Deco graphic design. Lighting: Flat, dramatic contrast, emphasizing pure shapes and edges. Color: Limited to charcoal black and cream white. Print-friendly details: Vector art quality, no gradients, no photorealism, perfect symmetry, sharp edges.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, grainy, photorealistic, oil painting, sketch, low detail, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy
